name: Sea Bass Greek Style
recipeIngredient: 8 sea bass fillets, each weighing 8 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the sea bass fillets with the flour.
2. In a large skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil over medium high until hot. Quickly sear the fillets on both sides to seal them. Place the fish in a baking pan and sprinkle with lemon juice. Set aside.
3. In a medium skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium high until hot. Add onions, garlic, and parsley. Sauté for 3 to 4 minutes, or until onions are translucent. Stir in pepper.
4. In a large saucepan, combine the sautéed onion mixture, canned tomatoes, chopped tomato, bay leaves, rosemary, and white wine. Stir ingredients together and simmer on low heat for 40 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F. Pour sauce over fish and bake for 20 minutes, or until done.
6. Garnish with lemon wedges.
